title: Acid-beet
content:

{{Quote|Obviously there were no acid-beets to make the customary side dish; indeed, I do not know that Vjun exports them any longer.|Fidelis explains the lack of side dish for the Crêpes Malreaux he created|<ref name="Y:DR">''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]''</ref>}}
'''Acid-beets''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of root [[Vegetable/Legends|vegetable]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] that were grown in the [[Acid rain/Legends|acid rain]] that fell on their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].<ref name="CSWE" /> The beets could be eaten by members of the [[Besalisk/Legends|Besalisk]] species.<ref name="Besalisk" /> They were used as ingredients in a side dish customarily served with [[Crêpes Malreaux]], a dish invented by the [[FIII Footman droid]] [[Fidelis]] for the [[Ninth count Malreaux]], one of the many members of [[House Malreaux]] who owned the [[Droid/Legends|droid]].<ref name="Y:DR" />

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', which includes the mention of acid-beets, to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> Fidelis made the Crêpes for the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie Malreaux]] and [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]] on board the [[B-7 light freighter]] ''[[Nighthawk]]'', though he lacked acid-beets to make the side dish he would normally serve and was unsure if they were even still exported from Vjun.<ref name="Y:DR" /> A dish called [[acid-beet salad]] was served on the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] for 3.5 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]<ref name="DaD">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/dexdiner/index.html|text=Dining at Dex's|int=Dining at Dex's}}</ref> until the [[Restaurant/Legends|diner's]] destruction during the first two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] rule.<ref name="DexEra">''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]'' established that [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] was destroyed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' later stated that the novel took place around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' states that the Empire was formed in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], so Dex's Diner was destroyed either during 19 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]] or 18 BBY.</ref> The [[Besalisk/Legends|Besalisk]] owner of the establishment, [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]], considered the meal delicious.<ref name="DaD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Acid-beets were first mentioned in ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', a [[2004]] novel that was written by [[Sean Stewart]].<ref name="Y:DR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book and [[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]]}}
